instruction: Create a formula that examines a range in Excel to 1. Look for a particular name in column C and Entry_Timestamp in column I, 2. Identify the latest Entry_Timestamp for that name and label it as 'Latest', and 3. Mark any other Entry_Timestamps that are not the most recent for the same name as 'Not Latest'. Note that I'm using Excel 2013 and I'm struggling to achieve the result I manually entered in the Max_Flag column of my worksheet (colored green).
